steps.title: Set the function value
steps.content:
The question asks when $f(x)=77$, so substitute $77$ for the output value $f(x)$ in the function equation.
$$7(2x+3)=77$$

steps.title: Solve the equation
steps.content:
Divide by $7$, then isolate $x$.
$$2x+3=11$$
$$2x=8$$
$$x=4$$
The answer is A.
